title: The Passport (Third Amendment) Rules, 1992 (07.08.1992)
text: REGD. NO. D.L -33004/92 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 341] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, AUGUST 10, 1992/SRAVANA 19, 1914 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 2044 GI/92 (1) -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II-SEC. 3 (t)] -- 2 of 4 -- 3 MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th August, 1992. G.3.R. 72HE).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1980 namely :— 1. (1) Thc^e rules may be eaVed the Passports (3rd Amendment) Rules, 1992. *?!«Alt (2) They shall come into force on and from the 17th Ahigust, 1992. 2. In the Passports Rules, 1980 :— (1) in rule 5,— (i) in sub-rule (1), clause (b) shall be omitted and clause (c) shall be renumbered as clause (b) thereof.. (ii) in the proviso to sub-rule (2),—(a) the words "a travel agent refer- red to in clause (b) or" shall be omitted . (b) for the word, brac- kets and letter "Clause (c)'\ the word, brackets and letter "Clause (b)" shall be substituted. (2) for "form EA(P)-1 and form EA(P)-2", the following forms shall be substituted, namely :— "Form EA(PH for India Form EA(P)-2 for India" [No. Vm[887[10|89] R. B. MARDHEKAR, Director (CPV) NOTE :—The principal rules published vido Notification GSR 691(E) dated 11th December, 1980, were subsequently amended by : 1. GSR 50(E) 07-02-1981 2.
